rect.style: stroke-width: 2; stroke: rgb(198, 198, 198); filter: url("#drop-shadow-filter-1"); fill: rgb(32, 34, 48);

ellipse.style: stroke-width: 1.499; filter: none; fill: rgb(255, 95, 87); stroke: rgb(226, 74, 65);
stroke-width: 1.499; filter: none; fill: rgb(254, 188, 48); stroke: rgb(231, 163, 33);
stroke-width: 1.499; filter: none; fill: rgb(39, 200, 64); stroke: rgb(32, 180, 44);

text.style: fill: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); font-family: "SF Pro"; font-size: 27px; font-weight: 700; white-space: pre; stroke-width: 1;

ellipse.style: fill: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: 3;

polyline.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: 3; stroke: rgb(255, 255, 255);

text.style: fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: "SF Pro"; font-size: 28.3px; text-anchor: middle; white-space: pre; stroke-width: 1;
fill: rgb(226, 226, 228); font-family: "SF Pro"; font-size: 30px; text-anchor: end; white-space: pre;
fill: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); font-family: "SF Pro"; font-size: 33.3px; font-weight: 700; text-anchor: middle; white-space: pre;
fill: rgb(223, 223, 225); font-family: "SF Pro"; font-size: 24.5px; white-space: pre;
fill: rgb(223, 223, 225); font-family: "SF Pro"; font-size: 25.7px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; white-space: pre;
fill: rgb(223, 223, 225); font-family: "SF Pro"; font-size: 25.7px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; white-space: pre;
fill: rgb(223, 223, 225); font-family: "SF Pro"; font-size: 25.7px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; white-space: pre;
fill: rgb(223, 223, 225); font-family: "SF Pro"; font-size: 25.7px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; white-space: pre;
fill: rgb(223, 223, 225); font-family: "SF Pro"; font-size: 25.7px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; white-space: pre;
fill: rgb(223, 223, 225); font-family: "SF Pro"; font-size: 25.7px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; white-space: pre;
fill: rgb(223, 223, 225); font-family: "SF Pro"; font-size: 25.7px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; white-space: pre;
fill: rgb(35, 35, 35); font-family: "SF Pro"; font-size: 27px; text-anchor: middle; white-space: pre; stroke-width: 1; filter: none;
fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: "SF Pro"; font-size: 27px; text-anchor: middle; white-space: pre; stroke-width: 1; filter: none;
